perturbation.original_text: 6.1 Term. This Agreement shall become effective as of the Effective Date and shall remain in effect as follows. (a) Dr. Murray's obligations set out herein shall be performed from the Effective Date until December 31, 2018 (the initial "Services Term"). The Services Term of this Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive two-year terms thereafter unless written notice is given by either party to the other, indicating that party's intention not to renew the Services Term of this Agreement, at least ninety (90) days prior to the end of the initial Services Term or any renewed Services Term.
perturbation.changed_text: 6.1 Term. This Agreement shall become effective as of the Effective Date and shall remain in effect as follows. (a) Dr. Murray's obligations set out herein shall be performed from the Effective Date until December 31, 2018 (the initial "Services Term"). The Services Term of this Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive two-year terms thereafter unless written notice is given by either party to the other, indicating that party's intention not to renew the Services Term of this Agreement, at least thirty (30) days prior to the end of the initial Services Term or any renewed Services Term.
perturbation.explanation: The change reduces the notice period required to prevent automatic renewal of the Services Term from 'ninety (90) days' to 'thirty (30) days'. This creates an in-text contradiction because the original text establishes a specific 90-day notice period, while the modified text drastically shortens it to 30 days, conflicting with the initially agreed-upon timeframe. This can create confusion and disputes about the terms of renewal
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6.1 Term. This Agreement shall become effective as of the Effective Date and shall remain in effect as follows. (a) Dr. Murray's obligations set out herein shall be performed from the Effective Date until December 31, 2018 (the initial "Services Term"). The Services Term of this Agreement shall be automatically renewed for successive two-year terms thereafter unless written notice is given by either party to the other, indicating that party's intention not to renew the Services Term of this Agreement, at least thirty (30) days prior to the end of the initial Services Term or any renewed Services Term.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the notice period required to prevent automatic renewal from 90 days to 30 days. The contradicted text contains this same modified clause. Because the changed text is in direct conflict with the original 90 day notice period, this establishes a contradiction. The original agreement stipulated a 90-day notice, while the changed text enforces a 30-day notice, creating an inconsistency.
